fire_rating.ul_design: UL D916 (beam assembly — connection zone included)

components.name: Beam Web
components.description: Web of the supported beam at the shear tab connection. Beam web may be coped at top and/or bottom flange.

properties.cope_note: Top cope typical for framing into column web; bottom cope less common

components.name: Shear Tab Plate
components.description: Single plate (shear tab) shop-welded to column flange or web, field-bolted to beam web

properties.weld_to_column: Fillet weld both sides, shop applied
properties.bolt_to_beam: A325 or A490 bolts in standard holes

components.name: High-Strength Bolts
components.description: Bolts connecting shear tab to beam web. Bolt heads and nuts must be fully encapsulated in SFRM.

properties.installation: Snug-tight or pretensioned per connection design
properties.sfrm_note: Bolt projection adds to required SFRM profile depth

components.name: SFRM Encapsulating Connection
components.description: SFRM coverage encapsulating the entire shear tab connection — plate, bolts, weld, and adjacent beam/column surfaces

properties.coverage: 100% of plate, bolt heads, nut faces, weld profiles
properties.thickness: Match the greater of beam or column SFRM requirement
properties.build_up_at_bolts: SFRM must cover bolt head/nut projection plus specified thickness beyond

components.name: Fireproofing Continuity — Beam and Column
components.description: SFRM on shear tab must transition seamlessly into beam SFRM and column SFRM with no gaps

properties.column_side: Continuous with column SFRM — no shadow zone behind tab

assembly_constraints.description: All bolt heads and nuts must be fully encapsulated — bolt projection must be included in thickness measurement
assembly_constraints.rule: SFRM thickness measured from outermost point (bolt head/nut face), not from plate surface

assembly_constraints.description: No shadow zones — back side of shear tab (between tab and column) must be filled with SFRM
assembly_constraints.rule: SFRM must fill the gap between shear tab and column surface or the gap must be within the column SFRM envelope

assembly_constraints.description: Coped beam ends at shear tab expose additional steel surfaces
assembly_constraints.rule: All coped surfaces must receive full SFRM coverage at specified thickness

assembly_constraints.description: Shop welds attaching tab to column must be covered
assembly_constraints.rule: Weld profiles fully encapsulated — no weld toes exposed
